headline: Here's Why The Cooper Companies (COO) is a Strong Growth Stock
summary: The Zacks Style Scores offers investors a way to easily find top-rated stocks based on their investing style. Here's why you should take advantage.

headline: Cooper Cos Inc/The (NASDAQ:COO): A Decent Value Opportunity in the Healthcare Sector
summary: Cooper Cos (COO) shows strong value with a 7/10 valuation rating, trading at a P/E of 15.07—cheaper than 87% of peers. Solid profitability (7/10) and decent growth make it a potential overlooked value opportunity.
